description_long: This is a rectangular, stone-like sculptural object featuring high-relief carvings of multiple human figures in classical attire, some holding laurel wreaths and others seated or standing in dynamic poses. The front and back panels are richly decorated with detailed scenes, possibly depicting a historical or mythological event, with draped garments and expressive gestures. The sides of the object also display figures, though with less density and detail than the main panels. The top edge is uneven, with a broken or missing section, and a protruding, angled fragment is visible. The surface has a weathered, patinated appearance, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The overall form resembles a sarcophagus or monumental base, with a solid, blocky structure and a continuous relief wrapping around its sides.
description: A rectangular, stone-like sculpture with detailed high-relief carvings of classical human figures and scenes, featuring a weathered, patinated surface and an uneven, broken top edge.
description_view_0: The main panel displays a group of classical figures in high relief, with a central standing figure holding laurel wreaths and others seated or interacting around them.
description_view_1: A side view showing fewer figures in relief, with one prominent standing figure and a clear view of the object's depth and the broken top edge.
description_view_2: Another main panel similar to view 0, with the same detailed scene of classical figures, but from a slightly different angle, emphasizing the depth and relief.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, showing a pair of figures in relief and the continuation of the sculptural narrative around the object, as well as the thickness of the structure.
attribute_subject_matter: classical human figures in a narrative relief scene
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the object appears isolated against a white background.
